Metadata.title: Gabriel Ernesto Rodriguez Zamora | Software Engineer
Metadata.description: Professional portfolio for Gabriel Ernesto Rodriguez Zamora, a Software Engineer specializing in Android, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, mobile architecture, CI/CD, and AI automation.

Layout.footerText: Gabriel Ernesto Rodriguez Zamora - Software Engineer

Hero.title: Software Engineer specialized in scalable mobile products.
Hero.description: I build and modernize Android applications with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and modern architectures. I also design CI/CD pipelines, test suites, and agentic workflows that reduce friction for engineering teams.
Hero.specialty: Android, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, CI/CD, and AI applied to development.

WhatIDo.title: What I do
WhatIDo.description: I work across mobile development, architecture, quality, and automation to help teams ship robust features with less technical debt.

web.title: Modern Android
web.body: I build screens, modules, and features with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines, Retrofit, and patterns such as MVVM, MVI, and Server-Driven UI.

product.title: Architecture and quality
product.body: I modernize legacy codebases, modularize build logic, raise test coverage, and define practices that make code easier to maintain.

content.title: Automation and AI
content.body: I build tools, MCP servers, and workflows with Codex and GitHub Copilot-CLI to automate repetitive engineering and documentation tasks.

Services.title: Services
Services.description: Three concrete ways to help when you already have an app, MVP, or operation that needs technical judgment to move forward.

items.title: Technical audit for an app or MVP
items.body: For startups or businesses that already have something built and need to understand risks, priorities, and next steps before investing more.
includes: Critical bugs, performance, and basic security.
Improvement roadmap with cost and time estimate.
items.outcome: You receive a prioritized diagnosis with risks, quick wins, and a clear improvement path.

items.title: AI automation or integration
items.body: For companies that want to use AI practically: reduce manual work, connect tools, and turn scattered information into useful processes.
includes: Lead classification, email summaries, and reports.
Forms connected to CRMs, APIs, or internal tools.
Internal document bots and workflows with n8n, Make, or Zapier.
items.outcome: We deliver a working automation connected to your real tools and ready for daily operations.

items.title: Mobile / Android production support
items.body: For startups with an existing Android app that need reliable maintenance without hiring a full team.
includes: Analytics, payments, authentication, and key integrations.
Play Store compliance and continuous technical support.
items.outcome: Keep your app stable, current, and ready to grow with recurring senior support.

Services.ctaTitle: You do not need a generic agency. You need applied technical clarity.
Services.ctaBody: Tell me what you already have built, what is breaking, or which process you want to automate, and I will propose the most direct path forward.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.description: Representative professional, open-source, and personal projects focused on mobile, automation, and technical tooling.

projects.title: Multi-agent development framework
projects.problem: Problem: repetitive engineering and documentation workflows consumed time and depended too much on manually supplied context.
projects.solution: Solution: I designed a multi-agent orchestration framework with MCP, local tools, and custom servers to provide agents with project context.
projects.technologies: Technologies: Codex, GitHub Copilot-CLI, MCP, TypeScript, Node.js, terminal automation.
projects.result: Result: reduced manual overhead and support for complex development workflows.

projects.title: Android modernization in retail
projects.problem: Problem: legacy Java modules and traditional UI slowed iteration speed and product quality.
projects.solution: Solution: I migrated code to Kotlin, modernized UI with Jetpack Compose, modularized Gradle, and implemented CI/CD checks.
projects.technologies: Technologies: Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose, Retrofit, Dagger-Hilt, Coroutines, Gradle, Detekt, Lint.
projects.result: Result: mobile features for B2C and Loyalty domains impacting 100K+ daily active users.

projects.title: Eleuteria Writing Studio
projects.problem: Problem: create an open-source writing studio with a modern frontend, API backend, and automated quality gates.
projects.solution: Solution: I implemented a desktop app with a React UI, Fast API backend, SQLite, and frontend/backend test pipelines.
projects.technologies: Technologies: TypeScript, Python, React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Fast API, shadcn-ui, SQLite, GitHub Actions.
projects.result: Result: open-source application with CI/CD, pre-commit hooks, smoke tests, and automated coverage reporting.

projects.title: ReadE-DocOnline
projects.problem: Problem: securely read and verify ICAO-compliant electronic documents from Android.
projects.solution: Solution: I built a native app with NFC, MRZ OCR, and a secure handshake to extract encrypted data from e-passports and IDs.
projects.technologies: Technologies: Kotlin, Java, NFC, Android SDK, JMRTD, Bouncy Castle, OCR.
projects.result: Result: technical foundation for offline electronic document reading and secure verification.

Portfolio.caseStudyBody: Experience area backed by real projects from the CV.

BlogPreview.title: Ideas to write about
BlogPreview.description: The blog can grow around modern Android, mobile architecture, AI automation, and lessons from real projects.

About.title: About me
About.description: I am a software engineer with 6+ years of experience building, modernizing, and automating mobile products.
About.bio: I specialize in Android with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, while also working with TypeScript, Python, React, Flutter, and automation tooling. I have collaborated on products across retail, travel, telecom, and government, from high-traffic features to security modules, NFC, CI/CD, and agent systems for development.

experience.title: Experience
experience.body: The Home Depot, IBM, Expedia Group, CODE Ingenieria, and Thales DIS, across mobile, telecom, NFC, and internal tooling projects.

judgment.title: Judgment
judgment.body: I prioritize maintainable architecture, testing, measurable impact, and incremental decisions that respect the existing product.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.body: I work with technical clarity, useful documentation, automation where it adds value, and direct communication with teams.

values: Modern Android with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and MVVM/MVI architectures.
Quality through unit tests, instrumented tests, mocks, and profiling.
Mobile DevOps with CI/CD, GitHub Actions, SAST, Lint, Detekt, and Gradle.
Advanced automation with MCP, Codex, Copilot-CLI, and internal tools.

Contact.title: Let's talk about your mobile product or technical tool.
Contact.description: You can reach me by email, LinkedIn, or GitHub to talk about Android, automation, technical consulting, or collaborations.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what you need to build or improve.

Post.mainBody: Placeholder development with ideas, examples, links, or technical notes. This page can become a template for every post.
